The SortedDescendingDimension class¶

New in version 0.1.

Module author: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

class slicer.dimensions.SortedDescendingDimension(Dimension)¶

Summary¶

The SortedDescendingDimension class implements a special dimension which has his data sorted in a descending manner, upper levels.

A binary search algorithm is used to find the nearest value. There are two different cases:

  • intervals: {a:b} the slice returned include all the values <= a and >= b
  • discrete values: [a,b,c,d] return a list of four slices. If the actual values are not in the dimension, the nearest value is found.
